notes: Spartan figure involved in political and military actions against exiles in Athens, mentioned by Plutarch.

docs.title: Life of Pelopidas

docs.excerpt: … task; as they attempted Leontidas, a sober and formidable man, and when they came to his house found his doors shut, he being already gone to bed.
